positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial botanical mandala illustration. The composition features intricate, stylized flora (such as glowing ferns, lunar blossoms, and vine tendrils) intertwined with geometric celestial elements like constellations, crescent moons, and stylized star trails. The aesthetic is a blend of Art Nouveau etching and retro cosmic travel poster art, rendered in deep sapphire blues, midnight blacks, luminous emerald greens, and stark gold leaf accents. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes and strong line work for maximum contrast, suitable for direct printing on textiles. Central composition, perfect for repeat pattern use. Highly decorative, mystical, ethereal, high contrast, engraving style, vector illustration.
negative: low quality, noisy, blurry, fuzzy, grainy, amateur, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, monochrome (unless specified), muted colors, jpeg artifacts
